title: AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF THE KIAÃGAN HOSPITAL TO IFUGAO HOSPITAL

chunks.text:
H. No. 515 / 55 OG No. 21, 3822 (May 25, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2146, April 24, 1959 ]

AN ACT TO CHANGE THE NAME OF THE KIAÃGAN HOSPITAL TO IFUGAO HOSPITAL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Kiañgan Hospital in the Municipality of Ifugao, Mountain Province, is hereby changed to Ifugao Hospital.

SEC. 2. This Act shall lake effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, April 24, 1959.
